app.name: RuralLearn
app.footer: RuralLearn — Gamified Learning for Rural Education

common.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

landing.heroSubtitle: RuralLearn brings engaging quizzes, games, and rewards to students in rural areas. Built for schools with limited connectivity — learn at your own pace and have fun doing it.
landing.whySubtitle: Designed specifically for rural education — simple, engaging, and accessible on any device.
landing.featureQuizzesDesc: Learn through fun quizzes in Math, Science, and more — earn points with every correct answer.
landing.featureGamesDesc: Play educational games designed for rural students with low-bandwidth friendly design.
landing.featureLeaderboardDesc: Compete with classmates, earn badges, and climb the leaderboard to stay motivated.
landing.featureBadgesDesc: Unlock badges as you progress — celebrate every milestone in your learning journey.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to begin your learning adventure?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of rural students learning through play.

auth.loginHint: Students and teachers can login here.
auth.registerHint: Free for all rural school students.

dashboard.subtitle: Keep learning and earning rewards today.
dashboard.noBadges: Complete quizzes to earn your first badge!

quizzes.title: Quizzes
quizzes.subtitle: Test your knowledge and earn points.

quiz.introHint: Answer all questions before time runs out. Points are awarded based on your score.

games.title: Learning Games
games.subtitle: Play fun games and earn points while you learn!
games.mathSprintDesc: Solve as many math problems as you can in 60 seconds!
games.wordBuilderDesc: Build words from scrambled letters to improve vocabulary.
games.scienceMatchDesc: Match scientific terms with their correct definitions.
games.mapExplorerDesc: Identify states and landmarks on the India map.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Top students this month — keep climbing!

admin.dashboardSubtitle: Overview of your students and learning activity.
admin.studentsSubtitle: Manage and monitor your students' progress.
admin.name: Name
admin.quizzesSubtitle: Create and manage quizzes for your students.
admin.noQuizzesDesc: Create your first quiz to get students learning!
admin.subject: Subject
admin.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this quiz?
